title: Deep Work Sprint (45 min)
text: Plan a deep work sprint: choose one priority task, start with 5 minutes of setup, then work for 45 minutes without switching.

title: Quick Planning (10 min)
text: Write tomorrow’s top 3 outcomes. Add one constraint to manage attention and one first action to start quickly.

title: Pomodoro Reset (25/5)
text: Run one Pomodoro cycle: 25 minutes focused work, then 5 minutes reset. After reset, rate difficulty and adjust.

title: Inbox Zero (15 min)
text: Do a focused inbox cleanup: triage, archive, respond to only critical items, and schedule the rest.

title: Learning Block (30 min)
text: Choose one topic and do deliberate practice: read a concept, write a summary, then attempt one problem/application.

title: Movement Break (20 min)
text: Take a movement break: light walk or mobility routine. Hydrate and do a short breathing reset.

title: Review & Reflect (8 min)
text: Reflect on what worked today. Identify one bottleneck and define a single adjustment for tomorrow.

title: Schedule ‘Deep Work’ Timebox (30 min)
text: Block one calendar timebox for deep work. Define a starting action and move distractions out of the session window.
